response.justification: Exceptional match on experience level, full-stack capability with the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), and current role directly mirrors job responsibilities including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. Exceeds 6+ year requirement with 18+ years total experience and multiple senior roles. Minor gaps are Nest.js framework specificity and explicit mention of Vitest/Jest/Playwright, but TDD culture and custom testing frameworks demonstrate strong foundational expertise.
strengths: 18+ years full-stack development with proven mastery of TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and developer tooling—directly aligned with job requirements
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) with demonstrated ability to pragmatically select appropriate technologies across multiple languages and domains
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned in resume; while Node.js expertise is strong, would require framework-specific learning
Testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly named despite clear TDD focus and custom testing library development
PostgreSQL and Kubernetes not explicitly mentioned; recent hands-on experience with these specific technologies unclear from resume

key_factors.factor: Full-stack mastery of primary tech stack
Current AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work
Nest.js framework and specific testing tool specificity gaps
